company_context: RunAI - Virtual Running App ‍ Running made fun and addictive RunAI turns running into an engaging game while helping you reach your goals faster with personalized training plans. Download RunAI! Download RunAI! Unlock your running potential The app that completely reimagine the running experiences and make it an enjoyable and entertaining activity for everyone. Our Features Runner-centric features, aided by the use of A.I. 01 Stay Motivated Run alongside virtual opponents tailored to match your ability, giving you just the right level of competition—never too far ahead or behind. 02 Improve Faster Follow structured training plans that is personalised based on your running ability 03 Celebrate Your Wins Earn achievements and badges as you reach new milestones. 04 Track Your Growth Visualize your journey with dynamic 3D progress tracking FAQ Don't see the answer to your question in our FAQ? Contact us below! When can I download the RunAI app? Yes, the RunAI app is now available on the Google Play Store globally. However, we are still currently in development for our iOS version of our app. More details will be shared with you closer to the date of the iOS launch. Is RunAI currently free-to-use? Yes, we still continue to offer free-to-use basic features on our app, such as the latest Free Run & Ranked modes. However, if users wish to get additional features such as the pacer mode & early access to new features, they'll have to access our RunAI Premium Subscription, starting from just SGD 7.99 a month. What makes RunAI different? When you run with our app, you’ll be competing against other virtual runners of a similar pace that push you to beat them in a race. Unlike other running apps in the market, the RunAI app strives to make your runs fun, and helps you to see your improvements over time. How do I find updates for RunAI? Any updates on our application, as well as weekly articles can be found through our community Telegram group . We also post running tips & updates on our Instagram & Facebook , as well as weekly articles on LinkedIn and on our website. Where can I report bugs & issues? If you encounter any bugs or issues, do report this to our support team at support@runai.io . What is the Terms of Service of RunAI? For more information on RunAI's terms of service, please refer here . Contact us Any questions, queries or collaborations? Contact us here ! Thank you! Your submission has been received! Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form. Terms of Service Privacy Policy © Copyright 2023 | All rights reserved | Designed & Developed by Jeremy

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like RunAI optimize their data analysis and gain valuable insights. I came across your company and was impressed with the innovative approach you're taking to make running more engaging. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing setup?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) Ah, another sales call. Look, we're busy trying to get our iOS version out the door. I'm not sure we need another data solution right now. What makes DeepData AI so special?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your priorities, and I appreciate your time. DeepData AI is unique in that it uses AI-powered processing to handle large datasets quickly and efficiently. This can help you gain faster insights into your user behavior, allowing you to make data-driven decisions to improve your app and ultimately drive more revenue. For example, you could use our solution to analyze user engagement with your virtual opponents feature or track the effectiveness of your personalized training plans.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (still skeptical) That sounds interesting, but we're already using a few different tools to handle our data. I'm not sure we want to add another vendor to the mix, especially with our limited budget. Your solution can't be cheap, right?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concern about budget, but our solution is actually designed to be cost-effective in the long run. By streamlining your data processing, you can reduce the time and resources spent on manual analysis and focus on higher-value tasks. We also offer flexible pricing plans to fit your needs. I'd be happy to discuss pricing in more detail and explore how we can tailor our solution to your specific requirements.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (somewhat convinced) Okay, I suppose it's worth considering. But how does your solution integrate with our existing tools and infrastructure? We can't afford to disrupt our current workflow.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our solution is designed to be highly integrable, with APIs and connectors for many popular data platforms. We've also worked with several companies in the fitness and wellness space, so we're familiar with the types of tools you're likely using. I'd be happy to set up a demo to show you how our solution can integrate seamlessly with your existing setup and provide a free trial to test it out.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (convinced) Alright, let's schedule that demo. I'd like to see how DeepData AI can help us optimize our data analysis and drive more growth for RunAI. Can you send over some available times for next week?

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Integration
Feedback: The seller could have further strengthened the conversation by providing specific examples or case studies of similar companies in the fitness and wellness space that have successfully integrated DeepData AI's solution. Sentiment: Positive
